recognition.notes: This source manifest intentionally remains bundled:false. release-app CI alone builds whisper.cpp v1.9.1 natively, verifies and stages the pinned official ggml-base.en.bin, then flips bundled:true only in its disposable packaging workspace. Until a verified release stage runs, the app reports setup as required and never falls back to a hosted transcription API.

speechOutput.notes: macOS uses say, Windows uses local SAPI, and Linux uses espeak-ng when available. No hosted TTS API is used.
